controls.removal_criteria: Replace only with a simpler workflow that preserves requirement-to-evidence traceability.

controls.scope: Normal and evolve requests with observable behaviour.
controls.introduced_for: Ambiguous acceptance criteria and unsupported completion claims.
controls.removal_criteria: Replace only if an equivalent approved specification source is enforced.

controls.scope: Changed code selected by an active technology profile.
controls.introduced_for: Generated changes reaching review without lint, type, or test evidence.
controls.removal_criteria: Retire only when superseded by an equivalent profile sensor.
controls.execution: harness-sensors.js loads executable profile sensor declarations and writes normalized evidence.
controls.self_correction: Read the affected sensor log, repair the reported path, and rerun the selected sensor before claiming completion.

controls.scope: Generated changes selected by review policy.
controls.introduced_for: Generator self-approval and semantic gaps in deterministic checks.
controls.removal_criteria: Retire only when a stronger independent review control replaces it.
controls.self_correction: Address evaluator findings with focused evidence, or explicitly escalate the unresolved trade-off to a human reviewer.

controls.scope: Harness-managed Bash commands containing clear destructive Git operations.
controls.introduced_for: Irrecoverable workspace damage during agent operation.
controls.removal_criteria: Retire only if platform-level policy enforces the same restrictions.
controls.self_correction: Use a non-destructive Git operation or request explicit human approval before continuing.

controls.scope: Selected changed paths, or the project-wide verification scope.
controls.introduced_for: Credentials or private keys accidentally committed by an agent.
controls.removal_criteria: Replace only with an equivalent or stronger secret scanner.
controls.self_correction: Remove and rotate the exposed credential, then rerun the scan on the affected paths.

controls.scope: Changed source paths governed by executable boundary rules.
controls.introduced_for: Agent-created layer violations and architectural drift.
controls.removal_criteria: Retire only when a stronger project boundary validator replaces it.
controls.self_correction: Move the dependency behind an allowed layer or obtain an approved boundary change, then rerun validation.

controls.scope: Changed source files matching maintainability.json extensions.
controls.introduced_for: God files and unbounded routers that escape human review (e.g. 500+ line modules).
controls.removal_criteria: Retire only when a stronger size/complexity sensor replaces it with equal coverage.
controls.self_correction: Split the oversized module along cohesive seams or adjust maintainability.json max_lines with an explicit justification, then rerun sensors.

controls.scope: Changed source files; functions should stay ≤ 30 lines (configurable).
controls.introduced_for: Long functions that hide branching, hurt review, and spiral agent edits.
controls.removal_criteria: Retire only when a stronger function-complexity sensor replaces it.
controls.execution: Built-in harness-sensors function-size (lib/maintainability-sensors.js). Runs for vibe and /harness.
controls.self_correction: Extract cohesive helpers until each function is within max_lines; rerun sensors.

controls.scope: Changed source files — bare except / empty catch detection.
controls.introduced_for: Silent failure and swallowed exceptions that break production support.
controls.removal_criteria: Retire only when language-specific linters fully cover the same patterns.
controls.execution: Built-in harness-sensors exception-handling. Runs for vibe and /harness.
controls.self_correction: Catch specific errors, log with context, rethrow or return a typed error; never empty catch/except pass.

controls.scope: Changed source — catch without log/rethrow; print/console.log in non-test code.
controls.introduced_for: Missing production support signals and debug print left in product code.
controls.removal_criteria: Retire when project SAST/linters enforce structured logging equivalently.
controls.execution: Built-in harness-sensors logging-discipline. Runs for vibe and /harness.
controls.self_correction: Use leveled structured logging on failure paths; replace print/console.log in product modules.

controls.scope: Changed source — nested loops, string += in loops (smells only).
controls.introduced_for: Accidental O(n²) and quadratic string building from agent edits.
controls.removal_criteria: Retire when measured perf budgets + better static analysis supersede heuristics.
controls.execution: Built-in harness-sensors performance-heuristics. Runs for vibe and /harness.
controls.self_correction: Remove nested full scans; pre-index; join strings outside loops; add G3 budget when hot.

controls.scope: Changed source files matching maintainability.json extensions.
controls.introduced_for: Copy-paste-and-adapt vertical slices and reimplemented helpers across similar capabilities.
controls.cost: Fast normalized block fingerprinting; default severity warn.
controls.removal_criteria: Retire or replace when a stronger clone detector is adopted project-wide.
controls.self_correction: Reuse one implementation or extract a shared helper; keep parallel copies only with justified-divergence, then rerun sensors.

controls.scope: The complete target project on clean CI infrastructure.
controls.introduced_for: Local-only evidence and configuration drift between agent sessions and CI.
controls.removal_criteria: Retire only if CI invokes the equivalent configured runner directly.
controls.self_correction: Reproduce the failed configured sensor locally, repair the cause, and attach fresh CI evidence.

controls.scope: Source paths selected by active technology profiles.
controls.introduced_for: Known vulnerable coding patterns not caught by tests or review.
controls.removal_criteria: Replace only with an equivalent or stronger SAST control.
controls.execution: Active profile sensor declarations invoke Semgrep.
controls.self_correction: Repair the reported vulnerable pattern or obtain an approved, scoped waiver, then rerun the scan.
